title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Books Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Books Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Books Advisory Limited in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Books Advisory Limited:
Landmark Books Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books Advisory Limited!
